x-enumeration-literals.name: Requested Execution Date
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Date at which the initiating party requests the clearing agent to process the payment. ISO20022
Usage: This is the date on which the debtor's account is to be debited. If payment by cheque, the date when the cheque must be generated by the bank.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Acceptance Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Date and time at which all processing conditions for execution of the payment are met and adequate financial cover is available at the account servicing agent. ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Creation Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Date and time at which the payment execution was created by the instructing agent. ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Value Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Date on which a payment must be executed (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Due Date
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Due date for the payment. (ISO20022)
    
Latest date whereby the amount of money must be paid. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Expected Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Expected date whereby the amount must be paid.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pooling Adjustment Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Date used for the correction of the value date of a cash pool movement that has been posted with a different value date. (ISO20022)
